packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis
basis: strict non-transforming JSON validation at identity-bearing boundaries
plan, manifest, execution, effect-recording, and replay boundary corrections

packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence
basis: strict non-transforming JSON validation replaces identity-bearing Zod reconstruction

packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-generator
basis: strict JSON boundaries preserve hostile own keys and reject hidden JavaScript state
catalog-conformance and transport records use the corrected boundary

packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-runtime
basis: the prospective package must bind the corrected kernel and evidence versions rather than alpha.3

packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph
basis: the prospective package must bind corrected kernel, evidence, and runtime versions rather than alpha.3

packages.name: @nicia-ai/lachesis-cli
basis: private catalog manifest, structural and suite comparison, and detached report-verification commands added

publicationSetRationale: The three corrected implementation packages and the CLI must publish their current behavior. Runtime and evidence-typegraph must be synchronized dependency-only republishes so no alpha.4 artifact resolves an alpha.3 Lachesis dependency.
